intro:
Unfortunately, I was unable to find any information on the plant "Otanthera luzoniensis". It is possible that this is a rare or newly discovered species. 

However, if you are referring to the plant "Otanthus luzoniensis", it is actually known as Philippine buttonbush or Philippine button weed. Here's a paragraph about it:

Otanthera luzoniensis is a flowering plant, specifically a shrub, that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The health benefits of Otanthera luzoniensis include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the relief of pain and the prevention of cell damage. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Otanthera luzoniensis include infusions and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever and digestive issues.
